rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of grouped references to prior coupon literature, mainly to support general points such as average coupon redemption rates, prior redemption history effects, and repeated exposure effects. The citing paper does not rely on Musalem et al.'s core methodological contribution (Bayesian aggregate-data coupon modeling), nor does it build its identification strategy or empirical design from that work. There is no distinct discussion of this specific paper's framework or findings beyond background support.
